title: Freight Operations Executive (Air Export / Freight Forwarding / East / MNC)
description:
• Company located at Changi Airfreight Centre

• Working hours: 5.5 Days (Monday-Friday: Normal working hours), Saturday WFH

• Well Established MNC Freight Forwarding Company

• AWS + Variable Bonus + Excellent Welfare

Job Scope

  • Supervise a small team, ensure shipments are arranged on time, maintain compliance with trade regulations, and support smooth coordination between clients, vendors, and internal teams.
  • Supervise daily export, and transshipment operations
  • Mentor and manage a small team of freight staff
  • Coordinate with internal teams: sales, finance, and warehouse
  • Handle client and vendor communications; resolve service issues
  • Negotiate freight rates and agreements with vendors and business partners
  • Ensure accurate shipment documentation and compliance with regulations
  • Monitor operational KPIs and suggest process improvements

Requirement

  • NITEC / Diploma / Degree in Logistics Management or relevant discipline
  • 2 - 4 years of relevant work experience in Logistics / Freight Forwarding company
  • Possess Certified Customs Declarant or Dangerous Goods certification will be advantageous

 

Candidates are encouraged to apply this position via Apply Now button with the following information in the resume:

  • Work experiences and job responsibilities
  • Current and Expected salary
  • Reason for leaving
  • Date of availability
  • Education background

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

KHOO SOT MEI (R21102604)

EA Recruitment Pte Ltd

EA License No: 21C0492
